resources.string: 3+ years of experience building scalable Java & Angular applications. Passionate about clean code, microservices, and delivering great user experiences.

I\'m a Full Stack Developer with 3.10 years of experience at Intellect Informatics Pvt Ltd, Hyderabad. I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, and Angular — building end-to-end scalable applications with microservices architecture. I\'m proficient in the full SDLC and passionate about writing clean, reusable code.
